model_scope: L group round 2 quantitative match predictions
scope: L组第二轮英格兰vs加纳、巴拿马vs克罗地亚量化预测；不进入出线预测，不给投注建议。

input_readiness.label: partial_source_limited
missing_or_stale_inputs: official final injury and medical bulletins
official venue weather and travel confirmation

fixture_confirmation.england_vs_ghana: 2026-06-23 local date, Boston Stadium / Gillette Stadium, kickoff Beijing 2026-06-24T04:00:00+08:00
fixture_confirmation.panama_vs_croatia: 2026-06-23 local date, Toronto Stadium / BMO Field, kickoff Beijing 2026-06-24T07:00:00+08:00

method.summary: Partial-current quant model using first-round postmatch interpretation, local player_state, team/tactics packets, model briefs and Poisson score matrix. Market fields are null because no official/live same-source odds snapshot is available.
method.double_counting_guard: Round-one results are reflected once through parameter_updates and player_state adjustments; no first-round betting snapshot is reused as live second-round market truth.
method.poisson_policy: Expected goals are converted to an independent Poisson matrix from 0-0 through 5-5, with remaining mass stored as tail_probability.

parameter_updates.reason: England scored twice after halftime vs Croatia and raised tempo immediately through Bellingham and late Rashford/Saka impact.
Kane two goals, Bellingham goal, Saka assist and Rashford goal increased attacking-chain confidence.
Rice corner to Kane and repeated second-ball pressure improved set-piece conversion expectation.
Croatia scored twice from transition/central-space moments despite England territorial edge.
Baturina/Musa goals preserved Croatia's experience and first-pass threat even in a 4-2 loss.
Croatia conceded quickly after halftime and again late, exposing fatigue and game-management stress.
England's wide and half-space runners repeatedly created separation after Croatia were stretched.
Ghana-Panama stayed 0-0 until 90+5, validating low-event baseline.
Yirenkyi 90+5 winner assisted by Thomas-Asante raised late substitute and direct attack tail.
Ati-Zigi was substituted around halftime; next-match goalkeeper availability remains a model risk.
Panama held Ghana scoreless until stoppage time and suppressed tempo effectively.
Panama created limited settled possession threat and showed little evidence of a strong late chase profile.

baseline_strength.notes: England retain elite squad strength and beat Croatia 4-2; Ghana are lower baseline but have defensive and transition paths.

recent_round1_form.notes: England attack overperformed the old 1-1 forecast; Ghana validated a low-score win script.

player_state.england: Avg form 3.00; Kane 4.5, Madueke 4.0, Anderson 4.0, Bellingham/Saka/Rashford 3.5.
player_state.ghana: Avg form 2.58; Yirenkyi and Thomas-Asante 4.0; Ati-Zigi substitution creates goalkeeper availability risk.

availability_and_injury.england: Rice and Rashford minor postmatch physical signals require T-75m check; no official lineup yet.
availability_and_injury.ghana: Ati-Zigi next-match status not confirmed; final lineup and goalkeeper order missing.

tactical_matchup.england: Tactical refresh raises England second-half acceleration, transition attack, wide-channel advantage, central control and set-piece second phase; transition-defense risk remains visible.
tactical_matchup.ghana: Tactical refresh keeps Ghana low-block/direct-counter path, late substitute disruption, transition attack tail and Ati-Zigi/Partey availability uncertainty.

schedule_environment.england: Arlington/Dallas to Boston/Foxborough long domestic transfer after about five full rest days.
schedule_environment.ghana: Toronto to Boston/Foxborough cross-border transfer after about five full rest days.

quality_notes: Data and tactical refresh are partial_source_limited, not final T-75m inputs.
England are first direction, but Ghana direct counter, Partey status and goalkeeper uncertainty keep the upset tail visible.
No official odds or T-75m lineup, so market calibration is withheld.

sensitivity.impact: Confirmed Ati-Zigi absence or uncertainty can move Ghana defensive xGA by roughly +0.08 to +0.15.
Kane/Bellingham/Saka/Rashford or Madueke mix can move England xG by roughly +/-0.18.
Deep 5-4-1 lowers total goals and raises 1-0/1-1; more open chasing increases England transition goals.

matches.match_cn: 巴拿马 vs 克罗地亚

baseline_strength.notes: Croatia remain higher baseline, while Panama's defensive organization is upgraded after a narrow stoppage-time loss.

recent_round1_form.notes: Panama defended well but lacked chase offense; Croatia scored twice vs England but faded badly after halftime.

player_state.panama: Avg form 2.42; many starters at 3.0, but no clear high-form attacking spike.
player_state.croatia: Avg form 2.85; Livakovic 4.5, Perisic/Baturina/Stanisic/Vuskovic/Sucic/Musa 3.5, veteran minutes risk remains.

availability_and_injury.panama: Blackman and Harvey yellow-card context requires official refresh; no final lineup.
availability_and_injury.croatia: Veteran minutes plan and full injury/discipline confirmation missing after high-intensity England match.

tactical_matchup.panama: Tactical refresh upgrades low-tempo block and physical resistance but downgrades build-up resistance, central control and chase-state quality.
tactical_matchup.croatia: Tactical refresh upgrades central control, build-up resistance and experience-driven transition while preserving late-game, wide-channel and veteran-load risks.

schedule_environment.panama: Same-city Toronto sequence from round 1 to round 2, lowest travel load in the matchup.
schedule_environment.croatia: Arlington/Dallas to Toronto cross-border transfer after England match; exact itinerary unverified.

quality_notes: Data and tactical refresh are partial_source_limited, not final T-75m inputs.
Croatia remain the stronger direction, but Panama's same-city rest, low block and low-event profile raise draw and under tails.
Croatia's late-game, veteran-load and wide-channel penalties prevent a high-confidence favorite output.

sensitivity.impact: If Modric/Perisic/Gvardiol minutes are managed or freshness is poor, Croatia xG can fall by roughly 0.12-0.20.
Long 5-4-1/4-4-2 compact phase raises 0-0, 0-1 and 1-1 paths.
Early Croatia goal opens 0-2/1-2; a scoreless first hour sharply lifts draw probability.

aggregate_quality_notes: Data and tactical refresh packets are both partial_source_limited; output remains pre-red-team and pre-T-75m.
Odds fields are null because official Chinese sports lottery odds and same-source live odds/handicap/totals are missing.
All outputs are probability discussion only and marked discussion_only_hold.
